target: SEC-4.2.2 prose precision (ISS-1760/1761/1796) + MOND sub_rationale consistency (ISS-2008) + 14 OBE resolutions

patches.description: ISS-1760: Soften trilemma scope claim — change "leads to the same admission" to "collapses to the same essential admission" to clarify structural collapse applies whichever rule is defended, without overstating arithmetic scope.
patches.find_pattern: The BOU-2017 trilemma below leads to the same admission whichever published rule the dome elects to defend
patches.replace_pattern: The BOU-2017 trilemma below collapses to the same essential admission whichever rule the dome elects to defend

patches.description: ISS-1761: Reword double negative — "the very signature the predictions.html rule treats absence of as falsification" is triple-negated and hard to parse. Replace with positive framing: the Chapman-pattern coherence required to avoid falsification was already present in BOU 2017.
patches.find_pattern: the very signature the predictions.html rule treats absence of as falsification — BOU 2017 already showed it
patches.replace_pattern: the very Chapman-pattern coherence the dome must observe in 2026 to avoid falsification was already present in BOU 2017

patches.description:
ISS-1796: Tighten "same Tier 1 block" to "same Tier 1 section" — curmudgeon confirmed the 0.0 nT quote and the coherence rule live in separate

blocks within the Tier 1 section; "same Tier 1 section" is accurate, "same Tier 1 block" implies same HTML block which is imprecise.
patches.find_pattern: the same Tier 1 block of predictions.html publishing the rule also publishes
patches.replace_pattern: the same Tier 1 section of predictions.html publishing the rule also publishes

patches.description: ISS-2008: Fix MOND sub_rationale cross-reference inconsistency. WIN-047 referenced non-relevant Part 6.14 (kappa cluster); WIN-048/052/054 referenced non-existent Part 6.13. Updated all four to reference cosmological-cluster section. Added missing sub_rationale to WIN-055.
patches.find_pattern: sub_rationale updates to WIN-047/048/052/054/055 (applied via node script)
patches.replace_pattern: See cosmological-cluster section (V51.0 Cosmological Expansion overview). [audit-trail only — not rendered]

obe_resolutions.reason: OBE: footnote (ii) already addresses SNK station code — text states coordinates are coincident with GUI to three decimal places; no further change needed.
OBE: footnote (iii) already cites NASA Solar Eclipse SE2026Aug12T with full URL, sampling methodology, and greatest-eclipse coordinates.
OBE: stale doc comment (counts.total=71) is in EXP-261 expansion file only, not in live HTML. Rendered HTML correctly shows 69. Audit-trail artifact, no live-site impact.
OBE: informational root-cause note about EXP-269/270 ordering. No live-site prose to patch; documents process coordination gap already past.
OBE: phrase "acceptance window" not found in docs/index.html or data/sections.json. Likely addressed by prior integration. Current text uses "falsification window" and "half-width" correctly.
OBE: same as ISS-1659 — stale comment in EXP-261 only, not live. Rendered HTML correct.
OBE: contrast discrepancy (7.69:1 vs 11.65:1) is in EXP-264 audit annotation only, not rendered in live HTML. AA pass/fail unaffected per both values.
OBE: same as ISS-1710 — internal EXP-264 annotation discrepancy, not live-site content.
OBE: footnote (ii) already says coordinates are coincident with GUI to three decimal places — the prior “~25 km” wording was already replaced by an earlier integration.

OBE: robustness paragraph already says "this is our charitable reading, not a dome-published number, but the only consistent extension of the dome’s own h_Sun framing" — derivation provenance already disclosed.

OBE: probability paragraph already has clustering-tolerant nulls: European mid-latitude swath gives 10^-16 to 10^-21; 150 active observatories gives ~10^-9. IID concern addressed in prior integration.
OBE: phrase "span at least 12,000 km from any starting point" not found in live text. Current text uses MST ≥11,700 km as lower bound and NN heuristic separately — correct framing already in place.
OBE: duplicate of ISS-1748 concern. Same text already acknowledges derived value.
OBE: duplicate of ISS-1749 concern. Clustering-tolerant nulls already present in live text.

tldr_evidence: Three SEC-4.2.2 prose precision fixes: softened overstated trilemma scope (ISS-1760), replaced triple-negative phrasing with affirmative framing (ISS-1761), tightened block-vs-section terminology (ISS-1796). MOND sub_rationale cross-references corrected for consistency across WIN-047/048/052/054/055 (ISS-2008). 14 orphan ISS confirmed OBE via live-site inspection.
tldr_verdict: All live-site patches verified in sections.json and rebuilt; 3606 tests pass. OBE dismissals supported by direct text inspection. No verdict changes.
